name: Beatraptor
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>縄張恐竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ビートラプトル</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Negate the effects of monsters in the Extra Monster Zones while this card is in the Main Monster Zone. When this card is destroyed by battle: You can Special Summon 1 "Beatraptor" from your Deck. You can only use this effect of "Beatraptor" once per turn.
mnst_eff: Negate the effects of monsters in the Extra Monster Zones while this card is in the Main Monster Zone. When this card is destroyed by battle: You can Special Summon 1 "Beatraptor" from your Deck. You can only use this effect of "Beatraptor" once per turn.
eff: Negate the effects of monsters in the Extra Monster Zones while this card is in the Main Monster Zone. When this card is destroyed by battle: You can Special Summon 1 "Beatraptor" from your Deck. You can only use this effect of "Beatraptor" once per turn.

mst: Negates the effects of your Effect Monsters
Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
